content:
MODULE: cosmos.web.routes.cli_bridge_api
FILE: cosmos/web/routes/cli_bridge_api.py (255 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: CLI Bridge API — OpenAI-compatible endpoint for CLI-backed inference.

Endpoints:
- POST /v1/chat/completions - OpenAI-compatible chat (routes through CLI bridges)
- GET /v1/cli/status - Status of all CLI bridges
- GET /v1/cli/rate-stats - Rate limit stats for all CLIs

Model names:
- "auto" — route

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def chat_completions(request: Request)
- async def cli_status()
- async def cli_rate_stats()
